description: Style NoteUrban trendy need not always flout the rules. This clutch from toniq, balances the fine line between completely ethnic and elegance. We recommend debuting this lovely piece with your saris and with your evening dresses!Product DetailsBlack pleated clutch with a magnetic flap closure and beading around the flap sidesHas a removable shoulder chainFabric inner with a pocket insideMaterial and Care70% cotton and 30% nylonWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 10 cm x 26 cm
